overview.short: Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church, Borivali (West) has been a Roman Catholic Parish from 1547 to 1739 and again from 1912 onwards.
overview.description: Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church, Borivali (West) has been a Roman Catholic Parish from 1547 to 1739 and again from 1912 onwards. It is situated in I.C. Colony or Immaculate Conception Colony, which is a large colony in the suburbs of Borivali, in the North Western face of Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Reportedly, Fr. Antonio Do Porto and his companion Fr.

topPlaces.name: Mandapeshwar Caves
topPlaces.description: The Mandapeshwar Caves (Marathi: मंडपेश्वर गुहा) is an 8th-century rock-cut shrine dedicated to Hindu deity Shiva located near Mount Poinsur in Borivali, a suburb of Mumbai in Maharashtra, India. The caves were originally Buddhist viharas.

topPlaces.name: I.C. Colony
topPlaces.description: I.C. Colony (Immaculate Conception Colony) is a locality about 25 ha (62 acres) in area in the suburb of Borivali in north-west Mumbai. IC Colony has the highest concentration of Christians, particularly of Roman Catholics in Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Dahisar
topPlaces.description: Dahisar (Marathi pronunciation: [d̪əɦisəɾ]) is the northernmost suburb (and railway station) of Mumbai, India. (Not to be confused with Dahisar Mori in Navi Mumbai).

topPlaces.name: Mandapeshwar metro station
topPlaces.description: Mandapeshwar (IC Colony) is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Yellow Line 2A of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station is located in IC Colony Road in North Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Eksar metro station
topPlaces.description: Eksar is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Yellow Line 2A of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This station is located in Borivali, Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Ovaripada metro station
topPlaces.description: Ovaripada is the elevated northern terminal metro station on the North-South corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro. This station is located in an elevated position on Western Express Highway in North Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Kandarpada metro station
topPlaces.description: Kandarpada is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Yellow Line 2A of the Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station is located on CS Link Road in Dahisar, Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Rashtriya Udyan metro station
topPlaces.description: Rashtriya Udyan is an elevated metro station on the north–south corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station was inaugurated on 2 April 2022 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

items.note: The Mandapeshwar Caves (Marathi: मंडपेश्वर गुहा) is an 8th-century rock-cut shrine dedicated to Hindu deity Shiva located near Mount Poinsur in Borivali, a suburb of Mumbai in Maharashtra, India. The caves were originally Buddhist viharas.

I.C. Colony (Immaculate Conception Colony) is a locality about 25 ha (62 acres) in area in the suburb of Borivali in north-west Mumbai. IC Colony has the highest concentration of Christians, particularly of Roman Catholics in Mumbai.
Dahisar (Marathi pronunciation: [d̪əɦisəɾ]) is the northernmost suburb (and railway station) of Mumbai, India. (Not to be confused with Dahisar Mori in Navi Mumbai).

Mandapeshwar (IC Colony) is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Yellow Line 2A of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station is located in IC Colony Road in North Mumbai.
Eksar is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Yellow Line 2A of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This station is located in Borivali, Mumbai.

Ovaripada is the elevated northern terminal metro station on the North-South corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro. This station is located in an elevated position on Western Express Highway in North Mumbai.
Kandarpada is an elevated metro station on the North-South corridor of the Yellow Line 2A of the Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station is located on CS Link Road in Dahisar, Mumbai.

Rashtriya Udyan is an elevated metro station on the north–south corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station was inaugurated on 2 April 2022 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (29 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Immaculate Conception Church, Mt. Poinsur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mandapeshwar Caves, I.C. Colony, Dahisar, Mandapeshwar metro station, Eksar metro station.
